predictedBugs: Missed import in a dynamically-constructed path string — grep only catches literal 'from.*src/constitution/' patterns, but string concatenation or template literals could hide a reference
Path resolution error if a file we didn't analyze uses a different relative depth (e.g., import from a test under a subdirectory)
The re-export shim removal breaks anyone still depending on src/constitution/ paths — confirmed zero direct imports except tests (which we updated)
edgeCases: Module resolution via tsconfig paths/aliases — verified no path alias points to src/constitution/
Config files referencing src/constitution/ (tsconfig, vitest, package.json) — verified zero references across all JSON/YAML configs
Dynamic import() in production code with computed path segments — exhaustive grep found none
